prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it discusses the regulatory judgement of Torus62 Limited, a registered provider of social housing operating within the regions of Liverpool, St Helens, and Warrington, all of which are located in England. The regulatory standards and assessments mentioned are applicable to the governance and viability of social housing providers in the English context.
